IOTest: 3 assertions (NIO Files, ByteArray streams, BufferedReader)
ReflectTest: 3 assertions (Class reflection, Method introspection, Field access)

documentation_gaps.gap: WSL native filesystem cloning requirement not documented
documentation_gaps.detail: CRLF conversion corrupts PNG binary files when cloning on Windows filesystem (/mnt/c/...). Must clone in WSL native Linux filesystem.

documentation_gaps.gap: No jtreg installation/setup guide in container environment
documentation_gaps.detail: Full test suite of 16,727 jtreg tests not executable. jtreg tool unavailable in container environment.
Default concurrency causes OOM (exit code 137). Requires --with-num-cores=4 and container memory limit of 12GB.

problems_encountered.problem: CRLF conversion corrupts PNG binary files when cloning on Windows filesystem
problems_encountered.solution: Clone repository in WSL native Linux filesystem (/home/weihaobin/tmp_src) instead of Windows filesystem (/mnt/c/...)

problems_encountered.problem: Build OOM (exit code 137) with default concurrency
problems_encountered.solution: Limit concurrency with --with-num-cores=4 and JOBS=4, add --memory=12g to Docker container

problems_encountered.problem: GPG check failure during dnf install

conclusion.summary: BiSheng JDK 8 repository builds successfully on openEuler 24.03 LTS with gcc 12.3.1. All 6 custom functional tests (30 assertions) passed. The repository contains 16,727 jtreg test files across hotspot, jdk, langtools, and nashorn modules. Full jtreg test suite was not executed due to jtreg tool unavailability in the container environment.
recommendations: Install jtreg to run the full 16,727-test suite for comprehensive validation
Consider adding jtreg to the container image or as a pre-installed dependency
Document the WSL native filesystem requirement for cloning to avoid CRLF issues
